violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil * was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. - Scoops used for powders and rice not contained in a way to keep the handles from getting in the raw materials.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment * was not cleaned properly. - cabinet faces and handles require a more thorough cleaning.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. - Dishwasher was not pumping sanitizer into the system. When tested registred 0ppm.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling * were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - floor in the back prep area needs to be sealed and easily cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - overall floors and walls require more thorough cleaning.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. - Mop not hung to drip and dry.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Food contact surface of utensil/equipment * was not properly cleaned and sanitized. - Cutting board and knife left on the counter.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned adequately. - Door Handles - Door Faces - CIP equipment require more detailed cleaning.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration * . - 0ppm--Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. - Sanitizer not functioning in the dishwasher. oppm
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food * was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. - Miso Soup was held in a Croc Pot at 125*F.
